app.name: ReWindowsMusic Mobile
app.description:
🎵 ReWindowsMusic – Ultimate Music Player for Windows Phone 8.1 ReWindowsMusic is a powerful, lightweight, and feature‑rich music player built specifically for Windows Phone 8.1 using pure HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript (no WinJS dependencies). It delivers a smooth, touch‑friendly experience even on older devices.
✨ Key Features 🎧 Play Local & Online Music – Load tracks from an XML feed, JSON API, or external sources.
📀 Smart Playlists – Create, edit, and save playlists locally (stored in localStorage).
🎙️ Podcast Player (PodCats) – Stream podcast episodes from an XML feed.
📂 ReOpenTracks – Load and play a huge JSON‑based music collection (150+ tracks).
🔍 Real‑time Search – Filter songs, podcasts, or tracks by title or artist.

app.name: ReWindowsStore Mobile
app.description:
📱 ReWinStore Mobile – Description ReWinStore Mobile is a lightweight version of our app store, specifically designed for Windows Phone devices. It brings the full power of ReWinStore to the mobile platform with an optimized interface and smooth performance.
🔹 Key Features of ReWinStore Mobile: Windows Phone native design – clean, touch-friendly layout adapted for smaller screens.
Fast navigation – swipe between sections, tap to download.
Full app catalog – access all apps and games available in the main ReWinStore.
One‑tap download – open download links directly in your browser.
My Apps list – keep track of apps you’ve downloaded, stored locally.
Lightweight and fast – works flawlessly on older Windows Phone hardware.
💡 Note: ReWinStore Mobile is available via the "Mobile Mode" button in the left menu of the main ReWinStore application.

app.name: ReWindowsMusic
app.description:
🖥️ ReWindowsMusic – Desktop Edition (Windows 8.1) ReWindowsMusic Desktop is a full‑featured, modern music player designed for Windows desktop environments. It brings together local music playback, online streaming, podcast support, and YouTube audio in one elegant, Chromium‑based (or UWP) application.
✨ Key Features for Desktop 🎵 Multi‑Source Music Library Play tracks from your local XML feed, JSON collections, or external APIs.
📀 Advanced Playlist Manager Create, edit, rename, and delete playlists; all saved locally in localStorage (or optional cloud sync).
🎙️ Podcasts (PodCats) Subscribe to podcast RSS/XML feeds and enjoy episodes with a dedicated player.
📂 ReOpenTracks Access a massive library of 150+ licensed tracks from opsrvlega.atwebpages.com/music.json.
🎵 ReZenDo API Search millions of songs from ZenDoMusic and get random recommendations.
▶️ YouTube Music Integration Search YouTube videos, extract audio via LegacyProjects API, and stream directly – no separate tab needed.
🔍 Instant Search Filter tracks, artists, or podcasts with real‑time, case‑insensitive search.
⚡ Playback Speed Control Adjust speed from 0.5x to 2.0x – ideal for learning, remixing, or fast listening.
🔊 Volume & Equalizer Presets (basic) Independent volume slider and speed buttons.
🖱️ Full Keyboard & Mouse Support Use media keys (if system‑wide hotkeys are enabled), plus intuitive mouse controls.
🎚️ Progress Bar with Seeking Click or drag to any position in the current track.
🔄 Loop & Shuffle (shuffle optional – can be added) Repeat single track or entire playlist.
🎨 Responsive Design Adapts to any window size – from compact (500px) to full‑HD widescreen.
🌙 Dark Theme by Default Easy on the eyes for late‑night listening.
